title: RGB Hitboxes
description: This Mod Makes It So That You Can Change The Color Of Your Hitboxes Or Make Them RGB/Rainbow
body:
This purely visual mod adds settings for the debug hitboxes.
Tired of looking at the same plain vanilla hitboxes? With RGB Hitboxes you are able to customize the vanilla hitbox color to your liking. You are able to have basically every color you want or just have it active as RGB/Rainbow as shown in the video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/y8KlNGYnf7k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod does not work when combathitboxes(the mod) is turned on.
